inputs.label: Mean Effective Pressure (IMEP)
inputs.businessContext: Indicated mean effective pressure inside the cylinder during the power stroke.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicated mean effective pressure inside the cylinder during the power stroke.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güç stroku sırasında silindir içindeki indike ortalama efektif basınç.
businessContext_i18n.de: Indizierter mittlerer effektiver Druck im Zylinder während des Arbeitstakts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression moyenne effective indiquée à l'intérieur du cylindre pendant la phase motrice.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión media efectiva indicada dentro del cilindro durante la carrera de potencia.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الضغط الفعال المتوسط المشار إليه داخل الأسطوانة أثناء شوط القدرة.

inputs.label: Cylinder Bore Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Internal diameter of the engine cylinder.

businessContext_i18n.en: Internal diameter of the engine cylinder.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre intérieur du cylindre du moteur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro interno del cilindro del motor.

inputs.label: Stroke Length
inputs.businessContext: Distance the piston travels from top dead center to bottom dead center.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance the piston travels from top dead center to bottom dead center.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pistonun üst ölü noktadan alt ölü noktaya kat ettiği mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Strecke, die der Kolben vom oberen Totpunkt zum unteren Totpunkt zurücklegt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance parcourue par le piston du point mort haut au point mort bas.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia que recorre el pistón desde el punto muerto superior hasta el punto muerto inferior.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة التي يقطعها المكبس من النقطة الميتة العليا إلى النقطة الميتة السفلى.

inputs.label: Engine Speed
inputs.businessContext: Crankshaft rotational speed in revolutions per minute.

businessContext_i18n.en: Crankshaft rotational speed in revolutions per minute.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Krank mili dönüş hızı, dakikadaki devir sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse de rotation du vilebrequin en tours par minute.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad de rotación del cigüeñal en revoluciones por minuto.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سرعة دوران العمود المرفقي بعدد الدورات في الدقيقة.

inputs.label: Number of Cylinders
inputs.businessContext: Total number of cylinders in the engine.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of cylinders in the engine.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de cylindres du moteur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de cilindros en el motor.

inputs.label: Strokes per Cycle
inputs.businessContext: Number of strokes to complete a cycle: 2 for two-stroke, 4 for four-stroke engine.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of strokes to complete a cycle: 2 for two-stroke, 4 for four-stroke engine.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir çevrimi tamamlamak için gereken strok sayısı: 2 zamanlı motor için 2, 4 zamanlı motor için 4.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Hübe für einen vollständigen Zyklus: 2 für Zweitakt-, 4 für Viertaktmotor.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de temps pour compléter un cycle : 2 pour un moteur deux-temps, 4 pour un moteur quatre-temps.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de carreras para completar un ciclo: 2 para motor de dos tiempos, 4 para motor de cuatro tiempos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد الأشواط لإكمال دورة: 2 لمحرك ثنائي الشوط، 4 لمحرك رباعي الشوط.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
